items.check: testforge --help shows all commands with descriptions
testforge init --help shows clear usage with arguments and options
Error messages are human-readable (no raw tracebacks for user errors)
Progress output from analyze/generate is informative
analyze produces structured output in analysis/analysis.json
generate creates cases for all analyzed features
report includes all test results with pass/fail status
selftest discovers and runs scripts from tests/selftest/
analyze with non-existent project path shows clear error
generate without prior analysis shows helpful message
manual check without active session shows 'run start first' error
LLM unavailable falls back to skeleton generation gracefully
init with existing directory does not overwrite config
generate --type with invalid type shows error
report on project with no runs produces valid (empty) report
projects in empty directory shows 'No projects found'
